titleStmt.title: SII 27.105: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 105. (A.R. No. 344 of 1930-31.) PUTTŪRU, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Mahāliṅgēśvarasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1353, Virōdhikrit, Marggaśira, śu. 5, Sunday. The tithi corresponds to 1431 A.D., November 10, the weekday being Saturday and not Sunday.

It registers gifts of lands, oil, money etc., to god Mahādēva of Puttūru, by Aṇṇappa, the two hundred parivāra, the four nāyakavāḍi and several other individuals, for worship and offerings in the temple and feeding brāhmaṇas in the feeding house attached to the temple. The gifts were made on the occasion of the visit of the preceptor Kriyāśaktidēva to Puttūr when Aṇṇappa, son of Dēvarāja was governing Maṅgalūru-rājya at the instance of pradhāna Hariyappavoḍeya. It states that Puttūr was in the jurisdiction of Pāḍayappa-arasa alias Baṅga.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1353 neya varttamānada virōdhikrutu saṁvatsarada mārggaśira śu 5 Ā lu śrīmatu
vijeyanagariya pratāpa dēvarāyaru catusamudra pālisuvalli pradhāna hariyappa daṁṇāyaka vo
ḍeyara nirūpadiṁda maṁgalūra rājyavanu dēvarājagaḷa maga Aṁṇappagaḷu Āḷuvalli pāṁḍyappa Arsarāda baṁgara
stānadalu puttūra śrīmahādēvara saṁnidhiyalu Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi tiḷugāḍiyanāḍu grāma muṁtāgi māḍida dha
rmagaḷa barasida śalāśāsana kramaveṁteṁdare Aṁṇappagaḷa keḷage tiḷugāḍiya Adhikāravanū māḍuvali kriyāśakti
dēvarugaḷu puttūrige vijeyamāḍidalli Ā kriyāśakti dēvarugaḷu Aṁṇappagaḷa budhivaṁta manuṣya dē
varasanu muḷiŪra Adhikāri dēvarasanu yiṁnūru parivāra nālvaru nāyakavāḍigaḷu kūḍi dēvara pā
damūlina kāsu bhaṁḍāri modalāda nālvaru pādamūlagaḷa nilisi māḍida dharṁmagaḷa vivara dēvara Amru
tapaḍige Uṣāpūjege nityastiti naḍava nayivēdyakke Akkihāne 2 kuḍute 2 kaṁ bhata mūḍe 22 naṁdādīvige 2 kaṁ bhatta mū 32
paḍuvaṇa hū tōṭava rakṣisi māleya kaṭṭi dēvara nayivēdyakke yippāne Akkiya naḍasuvare bhattamu 120 purāṇe
kaṁge bhattamūḍe 75 tuṁbeya mālege bhattamū 6 śrīrudra svādhyāya japadavaṁge bhattamū 60 nityakaḷasā
bhiṣēkake bhattamu 1Þ Āsraṁṇaṁge bhatamū 12 brāṁhaṇa bhōjanakke pratijana 1 kaṁ bhata mū 36 lekkadalu jana
6 kaṁ bhata mū 216 Aṁtu bhatta mūḍe 649 kaṁ mūḍe 881 . modalu kāṭi ga 1 kaṁ bhata mūḍe 4 ledalu baṁdakāṭi ga
1320 gaṁ kuḷava kaḍidu dhāreyaneṟadu kallanaḍasi koṭṭa ṭhāugaḷa vivara putūra mayiṁda hegaḍe Arasige voppi
sida samudāya ga 6 . kaṁ prati samudāya ga 1 ke kaṭuṁdeṟu kāṭi ga 10 ledalu kāṭiga 73 . kaṁ sthaḷada mu
ḍitāḍeya vivara Aṁdemaṁ Ūralu bayalu mu 17 nāyiladalu seṭṭitiyaru 1 kaṁ bayalu mu
8 Ane macalalu Āgraveṁba ṭhāvinalu bayalu mū 12 Ācaraṁ beṭṭinalu bayalu majalu beṭṭu sa
ha mū 15 Ācaraṁ beṭṭinalu bayalu beṭṭu saha mū 12 mudaḷa jeyalu bayalu majalu be
ṭṭu saha 13 Aṁntū bayalu majalu beṭṭu saha mū 75 kkaṁ kāṭi ga 73 ... Ātti taṭṭu beḷuvāda kāṭina bage
yiṁda pāgaḷeyalu baḍa noppisida ṭhāviṁda bayalu beṭṭusaha mu kaṁ kāṭi ga 15 ke vijadagrā
madalu nekkilāḍi voppisida ṭhālu pāyaka dēvariṁda bayalu mu 22 kaṁ kāṭiga 25 beḷupāḍiya
grāmadalu subraṁhmaṇyadēvara dēvasvadalu Agrāmadavaru voppisida ṭhāvinalu kayipaveṁba beṭṭinalu pa
yava seṭṭiyiṁda kāṭi ga 12 beḷupāḍiya pajaṁba seṭṭiyiṁda kāṭi ga 10 puṁjakuṁdaya ni
ṁda kāṭi ga 2 ... cauṭasāṁteyaniṁ kāṭi ga 2 seṭṭi beṁmuṇaniṁda kāṭi ga 1 Ayana saṁkrāṁti śi
varātriya pūjege hoṟapauḷi mūḷapauḷiya dīvige Aśva teṭṭu beḷuvāra kāpu paḍavaḷana kayyalū kā
ṭi ga 13 beḷupāḍiya kucuṁbaseṭṭiya kayyalū kāṭi ga 3 Āṁntū kāṭi ga 178 . nityastiti naḍava naṁdādī
vigeya ṭhāugaḷa vivara modalajeya toḷaiyalū tuḷuvarasugaḷu māḍida dīvige 2 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 72
ri leya tānaṁbinalū dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 mēgaṇa hakuvinalū dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hā
ne 37 ṇeṁba pāḍiyalū kesava niḍuvaṇa māḍida dharmadīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 37 naṁjeladalū dī
vige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 tāḷepāḍiyalu māṇila tana māḍida dharmmadīvige 1 kaṁ hāne 36 pāṁgaḷe
yalu kuḍiṁbaḷeyalu dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 vāsubhaṁḍāri māḍida dharmma salaṁkarada pratige sā
ṁti mugi koṁgaḷeyadalu dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 pudugoḷiyalu tilavarugaḷa bageya
lu dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 48 maṭṭaṁ tōṭina nērileyalu dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 mugeradēva
ru seṭṭi māḍida dharmma hosa mugeralu dīvige 1 kaṁ yeṁṇe hāne 36 dēvarabage brāṁhaṇa bhōjana jana
4 kaṁ bhattamuḍe 144 bhaṁḍārigara bage jana 4 kaṁ bhatta mū 144 kaṁ bikkala vivara baḷike majalalu tāpu naṁbiya
ra bageyalu bhatta mu 35 poyyanuralū biḍipana ṭhāvinalu bhattamu 20 kaṇeṁjaḍahanaṁbiya ṭhāvinalu
bhatta mū 14 puru vinanaṁbiyara ṭāvinalū bhattamu 18 poyyanūra tāmarekeḍiyalu paḍavaḷana kayyalu hi
ralaruvārada ṭhāvinalu bhatta mū 55 muḍarajeyalu daḷakitiya ṭāvinalu mū 13 tāḷepāḍiyalu
muraḍitā na ṭhāvinalu bhatta mū 3 niḍu pōliya nāṭi seṭṭiya ṭhāvinalū bhattamū 15 Ubhayaṁ bhattamu 144
mayiṁda hegeḍe māḍida dharma jana 3 kaṁ ṭāvina vivara Āne macalu yiṁnūralu Aḍakeyeṁba gadde 1 Āṁntu
maṁdacena ṭāvinalu bhatta mū 36 kāuralu paṭiyara beṭṭinalu kuṁñaṇeya ṭāvinalu bhattamu 36 ka
ra ṇa paṁjadalu Ayalagadde badekāru mā 6 kaṁ bhatta mu 20 Antū bhatta mū 13 dēvaṁṇarasaru māḍida dha
rma jana 1 kaṁbeḷe pāḍiyalu maḍumaṇela bhaṭṭana ṭāvinalu nālkukaṇe bayala gadde bidekāru mū 1 kaṁ bhatta mū 26 pu
ṁja kuṁdayana ṭāvinalu no ceṁbaḷi bidekāru mū 1 kaṁ bhatta mū 10 Ubhayaṁ bhatta mū 36 karaṇika viṭṭa
pagaḷu māḍida dharma jana 1 kaṁ makānadalu pūḍuṁbaḷi 1 parubaḷi 1 darakeḷagaṇa ciḷi 1 gadde 3 kaṁ bide
kāru mū 8 kaṁ bhattamū 36 kaṁ bhatada Arikamāḍida dharma jana 1 kaṁ keḷagaṇa kabakadalū nucalu bayalu sahita bitu
va bidekāru mū 11 kaṁ bhattamū 36 neru mugēra dēvaru seṭi māḍida dharmada vivara kūstiti naḍava nevē dyakke A
kki hāne 3 kaṁ bhatta mū 60 kaṁ ṭāugaḷa vivara baḷaka yeṁba bayala gadde 2 kaṁ bidekāru mū 4 kaṁ bhatta mū
30 nū neṭṭi ḍe Akkiya dēvarige naḍasikoṁḍu bahanū matte mūṟu beṭṭi koṁkaṇa ṭāvinalū
bhatta mū 10 dēvaru nayana ṭāvinalu bhattamū 10 bhaṁḍāriya ṭāvina biravadalu bhatta mū 10 A
ṁntū bhatta mū 30 brāṁhaṇa bhōjana jana 4 kaṁ bhatada vokala vivara taṁna mūla mugaralu bhatta mū 36 mugera
lu kēśavana ṭāvinalu bhatta mū 36 kavana gaddeyalu ru navana ṭāvinalu bhatta mu 1Þ
bhaṁḍāriya ṭāvinalu Avara beṭṭinalu bhatta mū 82 kāṁta seṭṭiya Aḷiya muḷakūra dēvaru seṭṭiya ṭā
vinalu bhattamūḍe 36 Aṁntū bhattamū 144 mate brāṁhmaṇa viṭṭaya koṁḍu kuṁbūraṁ mūḍaṁ pāḍi
ya ṭāvinalu bayala gadde maki baḷiti li gadde maṭaṁtagadde kuḷake hakāḷi Antū gadde 5 kaṁ bituva bidekāru
10 kaṁ bhatta mū 56 mane bāvi sahita

ya nāraṇa dēvagaḷa ma
ṁṇa māḍida dharma mūḍa
keḷata vana kayyalu
da braṁhmadāya nēralka
bedekeyalu bittuva
bayalu beṭṭu majala
muḍe tāḍe 40 padaliṁ
kaḷa bhūmi bittuva
bidekāru mū 10 Ubhaya
ṁ mūḍe tāḍe 50 yi muru
ṭhāvinalu Uḷaṁtā meṇa
sinakāna catusīme Uḷaṁthā
tōṭa kare maraphala sahavā
gi maṁcinātha dēvara dēvasvava
māḍida bhōgakke bhatta mū
ḍe 12 nū sīmeyanū yirisi
śāsanada kallanu naḍisi kraya
kke koṁḍaṁtā braṁhmadāya
vanu puttūra dēvaralli dinaṁ pra
ti mūvaru brāṁhmara chatrava
naḍasodeṁdu nāgaṁṇanu dhāre
yaneṟadu koṭṭanāgi Ā dēvara
nāgaṁṇa puttū
ru dēvara muḍe Āda
nālvara pāda mūligaḷu baṁ
gara manuṣya sahavāgi
davace grāma
kayyalu koṭṭavāgi Ā bhūmiyi
ṁda diśadavaru maṁjanātha dēvari
ge bhatta mū 12 puttūra dēvara
lli naḍava chatrakke varuṣa 10
bhattaṁ beḷe 2 kkaṁ macina hāne
10 lekkadalu naḍasuva bhatta mū
ḍe 108Continuation of line 91 and 92-3
Digital edition of SII 27.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
